overall.description: A third-person perspective video game scene showing a character in primitive clothing standing on a stone mountain path before the camera moves past them and continues through a stormy, misty mountain pass with rocky cliffs, dead trees, and atmospheric fog.

events.description: camera moves past the standing character and continues along the path without them

agents.ego_description: walking past a stationary character on the mountain path, moving from behind to alongside them

notable_agents.action: standing still on the path wearing primitive leather clothing, facing away from camera

entered.detail: wet flagstone path winding through the mountains
tall grey rock face forming the left wall of the pass
steep rocky cliff with sparse vegetation on the right
misty mountain peaks visible in the stormy background
character in primitive tribal outfit standing on the path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a third-person view of a character standing on a wet stone mountain path during a storm. The camera moves forward past the character, revealing a narrow mountain pass with steep rocky cliffs on both sides and misty peaks in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain pass with rocky cliffs and sparse trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone path through the stormy mountain pass, observing the rocky terrain

entered.detail: gnarled leafless tree with twisted branches visible in the distance ahead
water cascading down the right cliff face creating mist

segments.scene_description: The camera continues along the wet cobblestone path through the narrow mountain pass. The rocky cliffs draw closer on both sides while a large dead tree becomes visible in the distance ahead. Mist from a waterfall drifts down the right cliff face, and the stormy sky casts a gloomy blue-grey light over the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain trail approaching large dead tree landmark

events.description: path curves slightly left as camera approaches and passes the large dead tree

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path, approaching and passing the large dead tree while navigating the rocky terrain

entered.detail: large moss-covered rock formation on the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the large dead tree that dominates the center of the path, then moves past it as the trail curves. A large boulder appears on the left side of the path. The rocky cliffs continue to flank the route while the storm persists, with rain visible against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stationary character on a wet mountain path into the depths of a gloomy, storm-swept pass. It begins by gliding past a figure in primitive clothing to reveal a narrow trail flanked by steep rocky cliffs and distant, misty peaks. As the camera advances along the wet cobblestones, the cliffs draw closer and a veil of waterfall mist drifts from the right, all under a heavy blue-grey sky. The scene then shifts toward a large dead tree that dominates the center of the path, moving past the skeletal branches as the trail curves. Finally, the camera passes a large boulder on the left while rain continues to fall against the dark, oppressive atmosphere of the mountain pass.
